title: Uruguayan Renkon Empanadas
description: A crispy and savory empanada recipe filled with tender renkon and inspired by Uruguayan cuisine.

ingredients.name: Renkon
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the renkon into rounds.

ingredients.name: Lotus Root
ingredients.notes: Thinly slice the lotus root into rounds.

ingredients.name: Crispy Empanada Dough
ingredients.notes: Follow the package instructions to thaw the dough.

ingredients.name: Uruguayan Seasoning
ingredients.notes: A blend of herbs and spices commonly used in Uruguayan cuisine.

ingredients.name: Egg
ingredients.notes: For brushing the empanadas with an egg wash.

instructions: Roll out the empanada dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Place a spoonful of the renkon and lotus root mixture onto one half of the dough.
Add a sprinkle of Uruguayan seasoning on top of the filling.
Brush the edges of the dough with the beaten egg.
Fold the dough in half to enclose the filling and press the edges together to seal.
Use a fork to crimp the edges and create a decorative border.
Place the empanadas on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Brush the tops of the empanadas with the remaining egg wash.
Bake the empanadas for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
